TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ciwas Ali (lalu na plmukan 'ťęėťáĎÁī†śĘÖ', ryax sa 21 na byacing tay 9 squ kawas na 1965 - squ ) hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga 'tayal Taywan. kinqihan squ kawas na 2026 tzyu byacing 8 ryax Taywan nyux musa' kmzyap Ciwas Ali qu kinsat, kya qu musa' pbhul ga, nyux hiya' 12 kawas 6 byacing. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ťęėťáĎÁī†śĘÖŚßĒŚď°
S.PHON: ¶~ ®iwas~…ē ali (lalu na plmukan Ē**** Ē, rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - s~…ēqu ) ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a Ētajal tajwan. kinqińßan s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** tzju ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax tajwan njux mus~…ēa Ē kmzjap ¶~ ®iwas~…ē ali qu kins~…ēat, kja qu mus~…ēa Ē pő≤ńßul …£a, njux ńßija Ē ** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******
